title: AdvancedDarkness(UPDATED)
description: an mod that makes night very dark, overworld very foggy and disables some features perfect for horror games
body: Dread transforms the Overworld into a tense, oppressive environment built for horror. Fog swallows the world just a few blocks from your face, nights are pitch black with no stars or clouds to guide you, and all grass and flowers are stripped away — leaving the land bare and unsettling. Render distance is locked, fog thickens as darkness falls, and sleeping or skipping the night snaps the world into daylight instantly. Lightweight, client-friendly, and designed to drop into any horror modpack with zero configuration.
